heading: Use of Government iron pier in Delaware Bay
label: 7 Use of Government iron pier in Delaware Bay
text: The Government iron pier in Delaware Bay near Lewes, Delaware, shall be open to public use under regulations to be prescribed by the Secretary of the Army.
notes: CodificationSection is from act , popularly known as the “Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1916”.July 27, 1916A further provision of act , repealed , , which authorized a transfer of the iron pier to the Treasury Department.July 27, 1916act Mar. 3, 1891, ch. 54226 Stat. 969
